Emergency Alerts
Delayed start time at Sandia's ABQ site, Dec. 4
Thursday, December 4, 2025 | 4:30 am MT •
Due to inclement weather, Sandia’s Albuquerque site is implementing a delayed start time of 10 a.m. for all on-site members of the workforce on Thursday, Dec. 4. Unless your manager...
Lapse in appropriations
Wednesday, October 1, 2025 | 12:00 am MT •
Sandia’s website and social media sites are accessible but may not be updated during the lapse in federal funding.
Delayed start time at Sandia’s Albuquerque site, Nov. 7
Wednesday, November 6, 2024 | 6:00 pm MT •
Due to inclement weather, Sandia’s Albuquerque site is implementing a delayed start time of 10 a.m. for all on-site members of the workforce on Thursday, Nov. 7. Unless necessary and...
Sandia to resume normal operations on KAFB Saturday, March 16, at 5 a.m.
Friday, March 15, 2024 | 5:00 pm MT •
Sandia will resume normal operations at Kirtland Air Force Base on Saturday, March 16, at 5 a.m., following a power outage on the base. Although power has been restored on...
Update: Power Outage closure at Kirtland Air Force Base March 15, 2024
Friday, March 15, 2024 | 8:03 am MT •
Due to a power outage on Kirtland Air Force Base, Sandia’s Albuquerque, NM, site will be closed Friday, March 15, 2024. Although the power outage is not directly impacting on-base...
Power outage closure at Kirtland Air Force Base, March 15, 2024
Friday, March 15, 2024 | 4:54 am MT •
Due to a power outage on Kirtland Air force Base, Sandia’s Albuquerque, NM site will be closed today March 15, 2024 for all non-mission essential personnel. Do not come to...
CLOSURE:
Friday, March 15, 2024 | 5:00 pm  •
Sandia will resume normal operations at Kirtland Air Force Base on Saturday, March 16, at 5 a.m., following a power outage on the base. More info.
Inclement weather delayed start time 9-10 a.m., at Sandia’s Albuquerque site
Sunday, January 7, 2024 | 9:00 pm MT •
Due to inclement weather, onsite members of the workforce at Sandia’s Albuquerque, NM, location should report between 9 a.m. and 10 a.m. on Monday, Jan. 8. Unless necessary and approved...
Inclement weather delayed start time 10 a.m., at Sandia’s Albuquerque site
Friday, January 5, 2024 | 4:50 am MT •
Due to inclement weather, Sandia’s Albuquerque, NM, site is implementing a 10 a.m. start time for all on-site members of the workforce on Friday, Jan. 5. Unless absolutely necessary and...
Inclement weather 3 p.m. early release at Sandia’s Albuquerque, NM, site
Thursday, January 4, 2024 | 3:00 pm MT •
Due to inclement weather at the Albuquerque, NM, site, Sandia is releasing all on-site members of the workforce at 3 p.m. today, Thursday, Jan. 4. Expect delays, use extreme caution...

Sandia National Laboratories
is a multimission laboratory managed and operated by National Technology and Engineering Solutions of Sandia, LLC., a wholly owned subsidiary of Honeywell International, Inc., for the U.S. Department of Energy’s National Nuclear Security Administration under contract DE-NA-0003525.
